title: NEBNext® Ultra™ II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol forms an automated NGS library prep for the [NEBNext® Ultra™ II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina](https://www.neb.com/-/media/nebus/files/manuals/manuale6177-e7805.pdf?rev=60c9f0ba3c944a708539331d8a71dfbc&hash=B86DFE0923F3F6A7420D1C5A48BB62C5).
steps_raw: This protocol forms an automated NGS library prep for the [NEBNext® Ultra™ II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina](https://www.neb.com/-/media/nebus/files/manuals/manuale6177-e7805.pdf?rev=60c9f0ba3c944a708539331d8a71dfbc&hash=B86DFE0923F3F6A7420D1C5A48BB62C5).
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
keywords: NEBNext® Ultra™ II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina
materials_raw: NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt #402501
Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 1.5 mL Snapcap
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
